title: Fintrack Dashboard
summary: SaaS platform for financial analytics and reporting.
problem: FinTrack's existing app was built on a prototype codebase that couldn't handle their growing user base. Sync was unreliable, crash rates were high, and the team couldn't ship new features without breaking existing ones.
solution: We rebuilt the platform with a modern analytics engine and redesigned the reporting pipeline, introducing automated testing so the team could ship confidently every week.
results: Feature release cadence went from monthly to weekly

detail.description: A real-time financial analytics platform that helps businesses track performance, generate reports, and make data-driven decisions with confidence.
challenges: High crash rates and system instability
Slow reporting and data sync issues

testimonial.quote: The new platform has transformed how we work. It's faster, more reliable, and gives us the confidence to ship new features every week.

title: HealthHub Mobile App
summary: Mobile application for booking doctor appointments.
problem: HealthHub's booking flow lived across phone calls and a clunky web form, causing missed appointments and long wait times for patients.
solution: We designed and built a native-quality mobile app for iOS and Android with real-time provider availability, reminders, and a streamlined booking flow.
results: Average booking time cut from 6 minutes to under 1

title: EduLearn Platform
summary: E-learning platform with live classes and assessments.
problem: EduLearn needed to move from in-person classes to a reliable online platform without losing the interactivity of a live classroom.
solution: We built a web platform combining live video classes, assignments, and automated assessments, integrated with their existing student records system.
results: Onboarded 5,000+ students in the first term

title: Retail Pro System
summary: Inventory & POS system for retail businesses.
problem: Retail Pro's clients relied on a fragile spreadsheet-based process to manage inventory and sales, leading to stock discrepancies and reporting delays.
solution: We built a unified inventory and point-of-sale system with real-time stock tracking, replacing their clients' spreadsheet workflows entirely.
results: Reporting time reduced from 2 days to under 1 hour

title: TravelGo Website
summary: Travel booking website with custom recommendations.
problem: TravelGo's booking site had high drop-off rates during checkout and no way to personalize trip recommendations for returning visitors.
solution: We rebuilt the booking flow to reduce checkout friction and added a recommendation engine based on browsing and past booking history.
results: Page load times cut in half

title: Taskly SaaS
summary: Project management SaaS for teams and enterprises.
problem: Taskly's early product worked for small teams but broke down under the permissions and reporting needs of larger enterprise customers.
solution: We rearchitected the permissions model and added enterprise reporting, letting Taskly move upmarket without disrupting existing customers.
results: Closed 3 enterprise contracts within a quarter of launch
Support tickets related to permissions dropped by 60%
Platform scaled to 10x the concurrent users
